personal.name: Sanny Sherief
personal.title: Full Stack Web Developer
personal.description: I am a Los Angeles-based software developer who works with a variety of different languages and technologies.

introduction.heading: About me
contents: Born and raised in the city of Los Angeles, California, I have worked for several years developing software as both a hobbyist and as a professional. Leveraging the best-in-class frameworks and technology stacks, I'm able to take your product from idea to reality in record time.

I am currently attending Lambda School - an online course with a focus on computer science. Here, I study full-stack web development and hone my skills designing and creating brilliant web applications.
In my free time, I love to play video games on my computer, stay up late working on my personal projects, or just go out with friends.

contents.name: Cloud Sixteen
contents.title: Developer
descriptions: I am a developer and maintainer for the company's flagship product.
I've designed and developed numereous of the features it provides, investigated problems in relation to updates, as well as provided customer support.

contents.name: Thriving Ventures
contents.title: Developer
descriptions: I've worked on some of the company's largest products used by thousands of customers, and was the principal developer for implementing many parts of the user interface.
My responsibilities included maintaining the codebase, expanding it with new features, responding to customer inquiries, and deploying builds.

contents.name: My Portfolio
contents.description: The site you're viewing right now! I made it myself.

contents.name: GameVisor
contents.description: The website for a tool that manages game servers.

contents.name: HTML
contents.description: General website development laying the foundation for extension via other technologies. Liberal usage of semantic elements to assist in SEO and accessibility.

contents.name: CSS
contents.description: Designing website layouts, styling components, and ensuring visual consistency on all viewport sizes. Bootstrap, Semantic UI, and Tailwind CSS.

contents.name: JavaScript
contents.description: Breathing life into websites through providing dynamic interactions. Experience with jQuery, but comfortable with vanilla JS as well.

contents.name: React
contents.description: Single page applications, functional components, class components, hooks, fetching data, and state management.

contents.name: SQL
contents.description: CRUD operations, mass migrations, APIs, and ORM frameworks. Experience includes SQLite and MySQL/MariaDB.

contents.name: Lua
contents.description: Video game engine scripting and task automation. My personal favorite language to use, and the very first I've ever learned.
